items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl cuts Q2 dividend to $0.31 as Q1 adjusted NII falls
items.snippet: Blue Owl Q1 2026 adjusted NII fell to $0.31/share from $0.36; NAV dropped to $14.41; board cut Q2 base dividend to $0.31/share.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits

items.headline_ai: Blue Owl schedules Q1 2026 earnings release for May 6 with May 7 call
items.snippet: Blue Owl announced it will release Q1 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026 after market close, with a conference call on May 7.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl posts Q4 2025 NII of $0.38 per share, sells $400M loan portfolio
items.snippet: Blue Owl Q4 2025 adjusted NII was $0.36/share; the company announced a $1.4B direct lending portfolio sale across three Blue Owl BDCs.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl schedules Q4 2025 earnings release for February 18 with February 19 call
items.snippet: Blue Owl announced it will release Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on February 18, 2026 after market close.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events
8-K — Termination of Material Agreement · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl terminates planned merger with Blue Owl Capital Corporation II
items.snippet: Blue Owl and OBDC II terminated their previously announced merger, citing current market conditions, with plans to reevaluate alternatives.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl posts Q3 2025 NII of $0.37, announces merger with OBDC II
items.snippet: Blue Owl Q3 2025 adjusted NII was $0.36/share; the company also announced a definitive merger agreement with Blue Owl Capital Corporation II.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Regulation FD Disclosure · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl and OBDC II announce merger to create second-largest publicly traded BDC
items.snippet: Blue Owl and OBDC II announced a definitive merger agreement with OBDC as surviving company, adding $1.7B to create an $18.9B portfolio.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Blue Owl schedules Q3 2025 earnings release for November 5 with November 6 call
items.snippet: Blue Owl announced it will release Q3 2025 financial results on November 5, 2025 after market close, with a conference call November 6.

items.snippet: Blue Owl Q2 2025 adjusted NII rose to $0.40/share from $0.39; the board also declared a $0.02/share supplemental dividend.

items.headline_ai: Blue Owl completes merger with OBDE, creates second-largest publicly traded BDC
items.snippet: Blue Owl closed its merger with Blue Owl Capital Corporation III (OBDE) on January 13, 2025, creating a combined $18.6B total-asset BDC.

items.snippet: Blue Owl Capital Corporation (OBDC) and Blue Owl Capital Corporation III announced both obtained shareholder approval of their merger on January 8, 2025.

items.headline_ai: ISS and Glass Lewis recommend OBDE shareholders vote for Blue Owl merger
items.snippet: Proxy advisers ISS and Glass Lewis both recommended OBDE shareholders vote for the pending merger with Blue Owl Capital Corporation.
